📝 Add New Task

Enter your goal here... You can format text and create lists.
💡 You can format text (bold, italic, underline) and create bullet or numbered lists
💡 Automatic reminders will be sent every morning for the last 3 days before the due date

💡 Select users to share this task with. Check "Can Edit" to allow them to modify the task.
